_doc: SRD 5.2.1 weapon-property glossary. Keys are short slugs used by weapons.json:properties[].

properties.label: Ammunition
properties.summary: Use ammunition to make a ranged attack; you can draw it as part of the attack.

properties.label: Finesse
properties.summary: When making an attack, use either Strength or Dexterity for the attack and damage rolls.

properties.label: Heavy
properties.summary: Small creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls with Heavy weapons.

properties.label: Light
properties.summary: When you take the Attack action and attack with a Light weapon, you can use a bonus action to attack with another Light weapon you are holding (no ability-mod damage on the bonus attack).

properties.label: Loading
properties.summary: Regardless of attacks-per-action, you can fire only one piece of ammunition per action, bonus action, or reaction.

properties.label: Range
properties.summary: Has a normal/long range in feet; disadvantage past normal, can't attack past long.

properties.label: Reach
properties.summary: Adds 5 ft to the reach used to make melee attacks and opportunity attacks.

properties.label: Thrown
properties.summary: Can be thrown to make a ranged attack at the listed range.

properties.label: Two-Handed
properties.summary: Requires two hands to attack with.

properties.label: Versatile
properties.summary: Can be used one- or two-handed; the larger die is rolled when wielded with two hands.
